key_themes: Successful £12.5M fundraise for German acquisition and plant expansion
Progress in HyProMag rare earth magnet recycling (commissioning in Germany, UK plant launch)
Grant-funded collaborations for recycled magnets in automotive/EV applications
Bullish Hannam & Partners broker note with £2.40 price target (significant upside from ~£0.40)
Strategic positioning in Western non-Chinese critical minerals supply chain
summary: Mkango Resources (MKA), which spans rare earth mining in Malawi and recycling via HyProMag in the UK, Germany, and upcoming USA operations, is generating positive sentiment after closing a £12.5M fundraise at 33p to fund acquisitions, feasibility studies, and working capital. Recent milestones including first commissioning runs in Germany, new grant-backed collaborations on high-performance recycled magnets, and a detailed bullish broker note have excited REE investors despite typical junior mining volatility and recent share price pullbacks. With strong analyst targets implying over 500% upside and growing Western interest in secure critical minerals supply, the outlook is optimistic though execution risks remain.
sources: 15+ recent news articles and RNS releases (Yahoo Finance, Reuters, Investing.com, Proactive Investors, Junior Mining Network; primarily April 2026), ~15 relevant X posts from investors, company account, and mining news handles showing predominantly bullish commentary
